wincon_primary: Commander damage via Korvold growing massive from sacrifice triggers; often paired with extra combats or Chandra's Ignition
wincon_backup: Drain the table with Blood Artist / Zulaport Cutthroat / Mayhem Devil ping loops; Revel in Riches alternate win condition

wincon_primary: Time Sieve infinite turns combo using Tivit artifact token generation on ETB and combat damage
wincon_backup: Marionette Master / Disciple of the Vault artifact aristocrat drain; combat damage with evasive commander
budget_level: Medium ($300-$500, Time Sieve combo pieces add cost)
salt_score: Medium-High (extra turns combo can be frustrating)

wincon_primary: Curiosity / Ophidian Eye / Tandem Lookout combo with Niv-Mizzet for infinite draw-to-damage loop killing the table
wincon_backup: Laboratory Maniac / Jace, Wielder of Mysteries deck-out win; Guttersnipe / Electrostatic Field storm burn
budget_level: Medium ($150-$300, mostly cheap instants and sorceries)
salt_score: High (Curiosity combo is a known cEDH win line)

wincon_primary: Commander damage via Veyran getting massive from doubled magecraft triggers after chaining cantrips and rituals
wincon_backup: Guttersnipe / Fiery Inscription / Aetherflux Reservoir storm kills; infinite storm combos via Birgi / Isochron Scepter
budget_level: Low-Medium ($50-$150, many cheap cantrips and commons)
salt_score: Medium (long storm turns can be tiresome)

wincon_primary: Overwhelming board via Winota triggers cheating multiple humans into play each combat; Kiki-Jiki / Combat Celebrant combos
wincon_backup: Combat damage with Blade Historian / Angrath Marauders doubling; infinite combats with Combat Celebrant loops
budget_level: Medium ($200-$400, some stax pieces are expensive)
salt_score: Very High (banned in some circles, extremely oppressive stax+aggro combination)

wincon_primary: Infinite Tayam activations via persist/undying combo loops milling library and recurring all 3CMC or less permanents from graveyard
wincon_backup: Hatebear beatdown with stax creatures; Devoted Druid combo lines; classic reanimator beats
budget_level: Medium-High ($300-$600, stax pieces and tutors add significant cost)
salt_score: High (complex combo lines, stax elements slow game)
